'''chagasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ukranazi|ukranazi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ukranazi|ukranazi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chagasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chægæsæth|chægæsæth]] || [[word:chægæsæj|chægæsæj]] || [[word:chægæsæsh|chægæsæsh]] || [[word:chægæsæ|chægæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chagagasath|chagagasath]] || [[word:chagagasaj|chagagasaj]] || [[word:chagagasash|chagagasash]] || [[word:chagagasa|chagagasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chagasath|chagasath]] || [[word:chagasaj|chagasaj]] || [[word:chagasash|chagasash]] || [[word:chagasa|chagasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chagafsath|chagafsath]] || [[word:chagafsaj|chagafsaj]] || [[word:chagafsash|chagafsash]] || [[word:chagafsaf|chagafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chagasatha|chagasatha]] || [[word:chagasaja|chagasaja]] || [[word:chagasasha|chagasasha]] || [[word:chagasaka|chagasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chagasath|chagasath]] || [[word:chagasaj|chagasaj]] || [[word:chagasash|chagasash]] || [[word:chagasa|chagasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chagasathal|chagasathal]] || [[word:chagasajal|chagasajal]] || [[word:chagasashal|chagasashal]] || [[word:chagasakal|chagasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chagasathatha|chagasathatha]] || [[word:chagasajaja|chagasajaja]] || [[word:chagasashasha|chagasashasha]] || [[word:chagasaka|chagasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chagasathan|chagasathan]] || [[word:chagasajan|chagasajan]] || [[word:chagasashan|chagasashan]] || [[word:chagasakan|chagasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chagasathaoro|chagasathaoro]] || [[word:chagasajaoro|chagasajaoro]] || [[word:chagasashaoro|chagasashaoro]] || [[word:chagasakaoro|chagasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
